sections.title: 🔴 Triple embedding of the same text (biggest win)
🟡 `getActivePrompt()` — 2 sequential DB round trips on every chat message
🟡 `sampleNotes()` pulls 500 full rows to keep 20
🟡 Missing vector indexes (infra, not code, but high-impact)
sections.content:
`match_vault_notes` and `match_past_messages` run on *every chat message*. If the underlying pgvector columns don't have an `ivfflat`/`hnsw` index, these degrade to full scans as the vault/message table grows. Worth confirming in the migration files.

---

sections.title: 2. React Re-renders
3. Caching Opportunities
sections.content:
| What | Where | Suggestion |
|---|---|---|
| Active system prompt | `self-prompt.ts:getActivePrompt` | In-memory TTL cache (above) — saves 2 DB round trips per message |
| Kill switch | `self-prompt.ts:isSelfEditEnabled` | Same TTL-cache pattern, invalidate rarely needed since it's admin-toggled |
| Query embedding | chat route | Reuse one embedding across storage + both RAG calls (above) |
| Onboarding message | `api/onboarding/route.ts` | Already cached correctly via `user_state.onboarded` — good pattern, no change needed |
| Vault note sampling | `vault.ts:sampleNotes` | Push to SQL `random()` (above) instead of re-fetching 500 rows every onboarding check |

---

sections.title: 🔴 No abort handling on the chat stream
🟡 Fire-and-forget note extraction — confirm it isn't awaited inline
5. Redundant Computations
sections.content:
- **Duplicate embedding** — covered in §1, the single biggest redundant-computation fix (3x → 1x per chat turn).
- **`sampleNotes` in-memory Fisher-Yates over 500 rows** — replaced by SQL `random()` in §1; also removes the temp array copy (`[...data]`) and O(n) shuffle on every onboarding check.
- **`getActivePrompt` refetching unchanged data every message** — same fix as caching section; the prompt body typically doesn't change turn-to-turn.
- **History fetch** (`messages.select(...).order(desc).limit(10)` then `.reverse()`) is already efficient — just confirm a composite index exists on `(conversation_id, created_at)` since it's the hottest query path (every chat message).

---

sections.title: Priority Order (impact vs. effort)
sections.content:
1. **Dedupe the 3x embedding calls** — cheap fix, cuts ~200-600ms + 2/3 of embedding cost per message.
2. **Cache `getActivePrompt`/`isSelfEditEnabled`** — cheap fix, removes 2+ DB round trips per message.
3. **Add stream abort handling** — prevents wasted Anthropic spend on abandoned requests.
4. **Fix `sampleNotes` to sample in SQL** — only hits onboarding path, lower frequency but easy win.
5. **Review `ChatInterface.tsx`** directly (not in provided context) for the streaming re-render pattern — worth a follow-up pass since it's the highest-frequency render path in the app.

Want me to pull up `ChatInterface.tsx` and `AuroraBrain.tsx` to check the actual re-render behavior instead of the generic guidance above?

codeBlocks.code:
const { data } = await supabase.from("vault_notes").select("*").not("content", "is", null).limit(500);
// shuffle in JS, slice(0, 20)
